creator: nacai@iname.com
text:
I have been fixed the xfce port to follow its latest version.
XFCE is rewritten with GTK+, but xfwm is not so.

Deleted files:
patches/patch-aa
patches/patch-ab
patches/patch-ac

New files: NONE

Yukihiro Nakai
--------------
